ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: The ordinary Shadcn baseline provides the common Avatar composition but does not own this complete native, responsive, enhancement-off, and evidence contract.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Optional text-backed presence context stays readable without color and disappears completely when disabled.

visualSignature.summary: Literal white, ink rules, strong type, restrained green/violet state, bounded corners, logical properties, shared two-layer focus, and system-color fallbacks keep this item in the Mergora family.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Optional text-backed presence context stays readable without color and disappears completely when disabled.

api.enableWhen: Enable showPresence or presence or presenceLabel as documented; each boolean remains independently selectable where present.

disabledBehavior.ui: No enhancement-specific rail, context, control, or indicator is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The native-first baseline continues without enhancement work or state.
disabledBehavior.events: No enhancement renderer, adapter, announcement callback, or enhancement-only event runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No enhancement-specific live region, name, description, state, or focus stop enters the accessibility tree.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated native semantics, naming, per-item axe, explicit keyboard behavior or noninteractive classification, narrow layout, RTL, touch-capable interaction, forced-colors, and reduced-motion evidence is current; contract-required manual assistive-technology records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Fallback image naming, group overflow context, optional presence removal, and the intentional absence of component-owned focus stops are covered in both story modes.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.
